"opinion": "To deal with fake content on social media, it's essential to be proactive and vigilant in monitoring your accounts. Here are some steps you can take: \nFirstly, regularly review your followers and unfollow any accounts that seem suspicious or have a history of posting false information. Secondly, use fact-checking tools and websites to verify the accuracy of posts before sharing them. Thirdly, be cautious when engaging with content that seems too good (or bad) to be true, as it may be propaganda or disinformation. Finally, consider using third-party social media monitoring tools to help identify and flag fake content. By taking these steps, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content on your feeds and ensure that your online experience is safe and enjoyable."

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion:
To deal with fake content on social media, it's essential to be proactive and vigilant in monitoring your accounts. Here are some steps you can take: 
Firstly, regularly review your followers and unfollow any accounts that seem suspicious or have a history of posting false information. Secondly, use fact-checking tools and websites to verify the accuracy of posts before sharing them. Thirdly, be cautious when engaging with content that seems too good (or bad) to be true, as it may be propaganda or disinformation. Finally, consider using third-party social media monitoring tools to help identify and flag fake content. By taking these steps, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content on your feeds and ensure that your online experience is safe and enjoyable.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: To manage and deal with fake content on social media, it's crucial to be proactive, vigilant, and informed. By regularly reviewing followers, using fact-checking tools, being cautious when engaging with suspicious content, and considering third-party monitoring tools, you can significantly reduce the amount of fake content on your feeds and protect your online experience.
